title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: Audit complete. I inspected [assets](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets) and [research.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/research.json). **Visible source panel recommendations (by slide)** - Slide 1 `cover`: optional only. Keep footer citation strip; no large panel. - Slide 2 `4-axis framing`: add a compact “primary-source map” panel (Workspace / MHLW / METI / Cloud terms) so this slide is not footer-only. - Slide 3 `Workspace restrictions`: must show a visible excerpt panel from [workspace_terms.html.png](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/workspace_terms.html.png) with 12.7 + 12.11 callouts. - Slide 4 `Q26/Q27`: must show a visible panel from the MHLW PDF page containing Q26/Q27 text; current PNGs are not reliable anchors. - Slide 5 `A/B/C comparison`: include a small evidence row under each column (A=Cloud terms/Healthcare API, B=Workspace+MHLW+METI, C=JCHO+MHLW). - Slide 6 `GCP-managed path`: show two visible panels: Cloud terms (Training Restriction) + Healthcare API data-location. - Slide 7 `risk table`: show at least one side evidence panel (row-to-source mapping), not only table + footer. - Slide 8 `JCHO case`: keep a visible source screenshot panel from JCHO press page (this is a strong anchor). - Slide 9 `timeline`: add a compact closing evidence panel (“sequence derived from Q26/Q27 + METI + terms”), otherwise it reads as pure inference. **Reusable assets** - Reuse as-is (good): [workspace_terms.html.png](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/workspace_terms.html.png), [google_cloud_terms.html.png](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/google_cloud_terms.html.png), [cloud_healthcare_intro.html.png](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/cloud_healthcare_intro.html.png), [jcho_press.html.png](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/jcho_press.html.png). - Reuse with caution (source file for recrop, not final panel): [mhlw_q26_q27.pdf](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/mhlw_q26_q27.pdf). - Do not use as primary evidence panels in current form: [mhlw_page2-002.png](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/mhlw_page2-002.png), [mhlw_page3-003.png](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v4-native/delivery/assets/mhlw_page3-003.png) (OCR suggests table-of-contents-like content, not direct Q26/Q27 anchor). **Gaps / risks** - Missing asset captures for primary sources in research ledger: METI guideline PDF, Healthcare API regions page, Workspace Privacy Hub, Vertex FAQ. - Version drift risk: Workspace claim cites dated URL (`service-terms-20250828`) but local capture canonical is current terms page. - Legibility risk: current 1200x1200 “full-page” screenshots are often too dense for small in-slide panels unless cropped/highlighted. - Evidence placement risk: source-grounded deck still has multiple slides effectively footer-only; weak for auditability. If you want, I can next provide a strict slide-by-slide “panel spec” (exact asset, crop target, and caption text) before regeneration.
